steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence structure is: the team ______ the temperature difference to water evaporation. The blank must mean 'credited the observation to its cause.'

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'conceded': Means to reluctantly admit or yield — not the same as crediting a cause. ✗
  • Choice B — 'prescribed': Means to set a rule or recommendation — unrelated to explaining an observation. ✗
  • Choice C — 'attributed': Means to credit something as caused by or explained by something else — exactly what the sentence needs. ✓
  • Choice D — 'corrected': Means to fix an error — the sentence is not about fixing anything. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
